title: NASA Confirms Alien Spaceship Landed in India
short_text: Viral post claimed alien spaceship landed in India, but it was fake.
full_text: A viral video circulating on social media claimed that NASA confirmed an alien spaceship landing in India. Fact-checkers later revealed that the video was edited footage from a movie scene and not real. No official statement was released by NASA.

title: NASA Confirms Alien Spaceship Landed in India
